creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
TYPO3 v12 LTS will receive free updates for the next 3 years, and an additional 3 years via TYPO3's ELTS program.

The new version is packed with more than 200 new features which you can read about in our news post:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-v12-lts-here-to-save-the-day

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/12.4.0
